description: Entity that places an AI system on the market or puts into service (EU AI Act Art. 3(3)). Superclass of Manufacturer.
Entity that designs / manufactures a medical device (EU MDR Art. 2(30)). Subclass of Provider for our purposes.
Entity using an AI system under its authority (EU AI Act Art. 3(4)).
Natural / legal person established in the EU mandated by a Provider (EU AI Act Art. 22).
Entity placing an AI system bearing a non-EU name on the EU market.
Entity in the supply chain other than Provider/Importer that makes available.
Independent conformity assessment body (EU MDR Art. 35; EU AI Act Art. 31).
Author of a clinical AI model — TRIPOD+AI / FDA usage.
Entity submitting to FDA — premarket / 510(k) / De Novo.
Person using a medical device on a patient (EU MDR).
Independent reviewer / panel evaluating a model card or device.
